CustomField.description: This field is a informational field. It displays the label of the picklist value instead of the API name, such as 'Custom No. of Days,' to ensure user-friendly readability.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Periodicity__c, "Custom No.of Days"), "Custom No. of Days", TEXT(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Periodicity__c) )
CustomField.label: Periodicity
